channel.title: football on adhyaksa
channel.description: Recent content in football on adhyaksa

item.title: Looking Back at MUFC's Performance Last Season
item.description: Manchester United’s last season’s performance is unbearable to watch. At least for their supporter, including me. As a long-life fan, my bar is already set high as I’ve already witnessed the glorious era of this club. Apparently, it is too high for around these periods. The squad is in a transitional period, and they haven’t found their true shape yet. Even the manager has changed eight times since the retirement of Sir Alex, for crying out loud.
